name: Zucchini Hors D'oeuvres
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees.
2. In a large bowl, combine all ingredients except zucchini.
3. Mix thoroughly.
4. Stir in the sliced zucchini.
5. Lightly grease a (13"x9"x2") baking pan.
6. Spread the mixture evenly in the prepared pan.
7. Bake for 30 minutes.
8. Cut into 1 1/2-inch squares.
9. Serve warm.
